meta_title: Robo Dodd - Tech Guides, Kubernetes, App Development & Home Labs
meta_description: A tech blog offering detailed guides, practical setups, and hands-on experiments for Kubernetes, app development, and home labs. Clear insights for your journey.
code_injection_head:
<script defer src="/assets/vendor/cookiedialog.min.js"></script>
<script>
  const CONFIG = {
    googleAnalyticsId: 'G-GPS7086DZW', // Replace with your actual GA4 ID
    microsoftClarityId: 'mfmxg11bzf', // Replace with your actual Clarity ID
    debugMode: false
  };
  function log(message, level = 'debug', data = null) {
    if (level === 'error') {
      console.error(message, data || '');
    } else if (level === 'warn') {
      console.warn(message, data || '');
    } else if (level === 'info') {
      console.log(message, data || '');
    } else if (CONFIG.debugMode) {
      console.log(message, data || '');
    }
  }

  // Initialize Google Analytics with current or default consent
  function initializeGoogleAnalytics(consent = null) {
        
    if (window.gtag) {
      log('Google Analytics already loaded', 'debug');
      return;
    }

    log('Initializing Google Analytics...', 'debug');
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.async = true;
    script.src = `https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=${CONFIG.googleAnalyticsId}`;

    script.onerror = function() {
      log('Failed to load Google Analytics script', 'error');
    };

    document.head.appendChild(script);

    script.onload = function() {
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      function gtag() {
        dataLayer.push(arguments);
      }
      window.gtag = gtag;
      gtag('js', new Date());

      // Set consent state based on existing consent or default to denied
      const consentState = consent && consent.categories ? {
        'ad_storage': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_user_data': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_personalization': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'analytics_storage': consent.categories.analytics ? 'granted' : 'denied'
      } : {
        'ad_storage': 'denied',
        'ad_user_data': 'denied',
        'ad_personalization': 'denied',
        'analytics_storage': 'denied'
      };

      gtag('consent', 'default', {
        ...consentState,
        'wait_for_update': 500
      });

      gtag('config', CONFIG.googleAnalyticsId, {
        anonymize_ip: true,
        cookie_flags: 'SameSite=Strict;Secure',
      });

      log('Google Analytics loaded', 'info', consentState);
    };
  }

  // Initialize Microsoft Clarity with current or default consent
  function initializeMicrosoftClarity(consent = null) {
    if (window.clarity) {
      log('Microsoft Clarity already loaded', 'debug');
      return;
    }

    log('Initializing Microsoft Clarity...', 'debug');

    (function(c, l, a, r, i, t, y) {
      c[a] = c[a] || function() {
        (c[a].q = c[a].q || []).push(arguments);
      };
      t = l.createElement(r);
      t.async = 1;
      t.src = 'https://www.clarity.ms/tag/' + i;

      t.onerror = function() {
        log('Failed to load Microsoft Clarity script', 'error');
      };

      t.onload = function() {
        log('Microsoft Clarity script loaded', 'debug');

        // Set consent state based on existing consent or default to denied
        setTimeout(() => {
          if (window.clarity) {
            try {
              const consentState = consent && consent.categories ? {
                ad_storage: consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
                analytics_storage: consent.categories.analytics ? 'granted' : 'denied'
              } : {
                ad_storage: 'denied',
                analytics_storage: 'denied'
              };

              window.clarity('consentv2', consentState);
              log('Clarity consent initialized', 'info', consentState);
            } catch (error) {
              log('Error setting Clarity consent', 'error', error);
            }
          }
        }, 100);
      };

      y = l.getElementsByTagName(r)[0];
      y.parentNode.insertBefore(t, y);
    })(window, document, 'clarity', 'script', CONFIG.microsoftClarityId);
  }

  // Update Google Analytics consent
  function updateGoogleConsent(consent) {
    if (!window.gtag) {
      log('Google Analytics not available for consent update', 'warn');
      return false;
    }

    if (!consent || !consent.categories) {
      log('Invalid consent object for Google Analytics', 'error');
      return false;
    }

    try {
      const consentState = {
        'analytics_storage': consent.categories.analytics ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_storage': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_user_data': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        'ad_personalization': consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied'
      };

      window.gtag('consent', 'update', consentState);
      log('Google Analytics consent updated', 'debug', consentState);
      return true;
    } catch (error) {
      log('Error updating Google Analytics consent', 'error', error);
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Update Microsoft Clarity consent
  function updateClarityConsent(consent) {
    if (!window.clarity) {
      log('Microsoft Clarity not available for consent update', 'warn');
      return false;
    }

    if (!consent || !consent.categories) {
      log('Invalid consent object for Clarity', 'error');
      return false;
    }

    try {
      const consentState = {
        ad_storage: consent.categories.marketing ? 'granted' : 'denied',
        analytics_storage: consent.categories.analytics ? 'granted' : 'denied'
      };

      window.clarity('consentv2', consentState);
      log('Clarity consent updated', 'debug', consentState);
      return true;
    } catch (error) {
      log('Error updating Clarity consent', 'error', error);
      return false;
    }
  }

  // Update all analytics consents
  function updateAllConsents(consent) {
    log('Updating all analytics consents', 'debug', consent?.categories);

    const googleSuccess = updateGoogleConsent(consent);
    const claritySuccess = updateClarityConsent(consent);

    if (!googleSuccess || !claritySuccess) {
      log('Some consent updates may have failed', 'warn');
    }
  }

  // Main initialization
  window.addEventListener('load', function() {
    log('Starting CookieDialog and Analytics initialization', 'info');

    if (!window.CookieDialog) {
      log('CookieDialog library not loaded', 'error');
      return;
    }

    try {
      // Initialize CookieDialog
      const dialog = CookieDialog.init({
        position: 'bottom',
        theme: 'light',
        privacyUrl: '/privacy-policy/',
        enableLocation: false,
        categories: [
          {
            id: 'necessary',
            name: 'Essential',
            required: true,
            description: 'Required for the website to function properly'
          },
          {
            id: 'analytics',
            name: 'Analytics',
            required: false,
            description: 'Google Analytics and Microsoft Clarity for website insights'
          },
          {
            id: 'marketing',
            name: 'Marketing/Advertising',
            required: false,
            description: 'Used for targeted advertising and marketing purposes'
          }
        ],
        texts: {
          title: '🍪 We use cookies',
          description: 'We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and provide personalized content. This includes Google Analytics for website analytics, Microsoft Clarity for user experience insights, and Amazon affiliate links for product recommendations.',
          acceptAll: 'Accept All',
          rejectAll: 'Reject All',
          manageSettings: 'Manage Settings',
          privacyPolicy: 'Learn more'
        },
        onAccept: function(consent) {
          log('User accepted cookies', 'info', Object.keys(consent.categories).filter(k => consent.categories[k]));
          updateAllConsents(consent);
        },
        onReject: function(consent) {
          log('User rejected optional cookies', 'info');
          updateAllConsents(consent);
        },
        onChange: function(consent) {
          log('User changed cookie settings', 'info');
          updateAllConsents(consent);
        },
      });
   
      
      // Get existing consent or null
      const existingConsent = dialog.getConsent();
         log('CookieDialog initialized', 'debug', existingConsent);
      // Load analytics scripts with existing consent or defaults
      log('Loading analytics scripts', 'info');
      initializeGoogleAnalytics(existingConsent);
      initializeMicrosoftClarity(existingConsent);
      log('Initialization completed successfully', 'info');

    } catch (error) {
      log('Critical error during initialization', 'error', error);
    }
  });
</script>
